candidates.why: This appears within the Cost of Revenues structure: Costs Leases + Costs Own Operations approximately equals Cost of Revenues/COGS, and Depreciation/amortisation appears as a sub-component under Costs Own Operations. Since the selected parent bucket is the total row 'Cost of Revenues/COGS', adding this separately would likely double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This row is explicitly SG&A-related, not COGS-related, so it should not be added to the COGS bucket.

variables.notes: The selected COGS reference bucket is '[Income Statement] Cost of Revenues/COGS'. The visible D&A row 'Depreciation/amortisation' appears embedded within that total via Costs Own Operations, so no separate COGS D&A row should be added.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is the explicit SG&A depreciation row, but it appears to be already included in the selected parent row 'Central administration' because 'Central administration - Balancing value' plus this depreciation equals 'Central administration'. Therefore it should not be added separately.
This row sits in the operating cost / COGS section, not the SG&A section, so it is not an SG&A D&A add-back candidate.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS reference bucket is '[Income Statement] Central administration'. 'Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' is a visible component already embedded in that selected row, so adding it separately would double count.
